title: Villager Gold Washing Facility
description: Adds a Villager Gold Washing Facility Structure to the Badlands biome
body:
**Villager Gold Washing Facility**

This mod adds a Villager Gold Washing Facility that spawns in Badlands biomes.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9b735ffdef01d548fb1b4998a78682fc0d358a3.jpeg)

- The building is inhabited by desert villagers with matching professions.
- Around the facility, you will find some chests and a few hidden secrets.
  
![tent](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2ccb1b00ed03b3500ae08e17b49517562c305ab.jpeg)

- Chests feature custom loot tables, making the mod also compatible with the Lootr mod.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3f8fe9274bb7cd23d40dc07af8425e3648dcf50.jpeg)


feel free to put it in your modpack!
